notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Nick Allen to first baseman Isaac Paredes. Alex Freeland out at 2nd. Miguel Rojas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alex Call pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call doubles (3) on a ground ball to left fielder Yordan Alvarez.
